introSection: Tidal Wave is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Jenkinson's Boardwalk in Point Pleasant Beach, New Jersey, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride opened in April 2019.

The ride last operated on September 1, 2025.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 5 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 20 riders. Each row sits back-to-back.

fullText:
Tidal Wave is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Jenkinson's Boardwalk in Point Pleasant Beach, New Jersey, USA.

The ride opened in April 2019.

The ride last operated on September 1, 2025.



Single train with 5 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 20 riders. Each row sits back-to-back.
